_comment: Public workshop metadata for the inquiry system. Non-secret display data only. Calendar IDs and credentials are in env vars. Do not use funding categories such as G&S as class aliases; events should map to the actual public workshop topic.

classes.description: Create, edit, and share digital content — video, graphic design, photography, and studio production. Project-based sessions in a small-group public workshop setting.
Film highlights, create fan content, and tell sports stories through community media. Small-group public sessions combining community storytelling with media production skills.
